rows.label: tev019201_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev019201_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Lara Mara what he thinks about you.

rows.label: tev019201_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev019201_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Lara Mara if anything is troubling him.

rows.label: tev019201_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Lara Mara about the Bias.

rows.label: tev019201_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Lara Mara if he's heard any interesting rumors.

rows.label: tev019201_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Lara Mara for his thoughts on the xenoforms in NLA.

rows.label: tev019201_SEL0061
rows.name: Ask Lara Mara for his opinions on the Ma-non.

rows.label: tev019201_SEL0071
rows.name: Ask Lara Mara if he's heard any interesting rumors.

rows.label: tev019201_SEL0081
rows.name: Ask Lara Mara about how he fared after the Growth attack.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019201_SEL1011
rows.name: Ask Lara Mara for his thoughts on why the Growth are so obsessed with humans.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019201_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Lara Mara about recent developments.

rows.label: tev019201_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Lara Mara about recent developments.

rows.label: tev019201_SEL2031
rows.name: Ask Lara Mara for his thoughts on giving up his Blue Blood and returning to his original body.

rows.label: tev019201_MSG0001
rows.name:
Are you that new crew member that Elma
and Vandham had been searching for, mmm?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019201_MSG0002
rows.name:
Oh, I could tell. You seem so much stronger
than those other BLADEs...plus there's
that disoriented look on your face.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019201_MSG0003
rows.name:
They said they found 10 people,
but you're the only one I've
ever seen. Iiiiinteresting...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019201_MSG0004
rows.name:
Director General Chausson has an honest and
somber face, but he's a politician first and
foremost. And we know what THAT means, mmm? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019201_MSG0008
rows.name:
Aw, were you worried about little old
me? You're so sweet! Am I blushing?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019201_MSG0009
rows.name:
Since you're such a sweetheart, I've
got an important mission for you—bring
me happiness for the rest of my life![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019201_MSG0010
rows.name:
Kidding! Just kidding. Don't get
your biorhythms all in a twist.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019201_MSG0011
rows.name:
But I WASN'T kidding about wanting to give you
an important mission. There's...something about
you. You're not like all those other BLADEs.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019201_MSG0017
rows.name:
I saw one! I saw one! I saw one of those
terrifying Bias creature thingies![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019201_MSG0018
rows.name:
That mouth looked like it was designed
to swallow human heads whole. Brrrr![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019201_MSG0019
rows.name:
I wonder how those big uglies even
know about us little humans?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019201_MSG0020
rows.name:
Not that I mind being famous,
mind you. I just don't want to
be famous for being delicious.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019201_MSG0025
rows.name:
Did you know that when you attack a foe from behind,
it's easier to land a hit and you're more likely to
dish out a particularly vicious strike? Mmm-hmmm.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019201_MSG0026
rows.name:
...What's that? You consider
striking from behind to be a mark
of cowardice and low character?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019201_MSG0027
rows.name:
My dear, the only chivalrous people
on the battlefield are the dead men.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019201_MSG0028
rows.name:
If you want to survive on this
cruel world, sometimes you have
to be a bit of a bastard.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019201_MSG0035
rows.name:
I can't say I've liked the looks of most
of the xenoforms we've met so far.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019201_MSG0036
rows.name:
But those Nopon are so
fluffy and adorable![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019201_MSG0037
rows.name:
Oh, and that guy who just showed up in
Armory Alley is mind-blowingly hot.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019201_MSG0042
rows.name:
I wonder if he has any single
friends... Ah, but speak of the devil![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019201_MSG0043
rows.name:
...Oh? Might you be speaking of us?
We have long suspected ourself to
be quite the handsome fellow.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019201_MSG0044
rows.name:
In regards to your previous question, alas, the
answer is no. Sadly, we are the only one of our
kind. They truly broke the mole when they made us![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019201_MSG0045
rows.name:
Oh, you must have spent many a lonely night out
there by yourself... But I'm sure I can ease that
lonely heart of yours, now that you're here![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019201_MSG0046
rows.name:
I wonder if he has any friends? If we're
talking cute xenoforms like him and the Nopon,
I'll welcome them with open arms. Grrrawl![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019201_MSG0051
rows.name:
When I first saw the government's announcement
about the Ma-non living in NLA, I thought
they looked all reptilian and gross.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019201_MSG0052
rows.name:
But I no longer feel that way. In
fact, I'm ashamed I ever did![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019201_MSG0053
rows.name:
Rutantan is giving us one great idea
after another. He's really SUCH a help![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019201_MSG0054
rows.name:
And all beauty is subjective, right?
It's what's inside that matters.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019201_MSG0055
rows.name:
I wish I could get a cool boyfriend who
would say things like that about me...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019201_MSG0070
rows.name:
Earlier, I was thinking about how horrible life was.
No matter how much time you spend training yourself,
buying and maintaining weapons, and so on...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019201_MSG0071
rows.name:
death could still come for you in
an instant. And when I realized
that, I choked up a little bit.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019201_MSG0072
rows.name:
And suddenly this little xeno guy—who I'd
never seen pay much attention to anyone—came
over and tried to cheer me up![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019201_MSG0073
rows.name: So I've resolved to go on for his sake.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019201_MSG0074
rows.name:
If only he'd have been a wonderful
human, the story could have had
a real happy ending.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019201_MSG1001
rows.name:
Why do you think the Growth are coming
after us humans like this, mmm?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019201_MSG1002
rows.name:
Do they want the Lifepoint for some
reason? Or do they just object to us
humans tromping around this planet?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019201_MSG1003
rows.name:
Or maybe they're violently jealous
of my grace and beauty? Wouldn't be
the first time that happened...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019201_MSG1004
rows.name:
Oh, come on! That was a joooooke! Don't
stare at me like a crazy person.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019201_MSG1010
rows.name:
I feel like the Growth are rubbing their
technological superiority in our faces.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019201_MSG1011
rows.name: But I'm not discouraged at all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019201_MSG1012
rows.name:
After all, now we have Rutantan quickly
taking apart and analyzing all the little
gizmos they spent so much time developing.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019201_MSG1013
rows.name:
Oh, and of course there's you—the one
who's smashing them apart to begin with![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019201_MSG2001
rows.name:
I listened to some of the
communication logs you brought back.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019201_MSG2002
rows.name:
Since they were emergency
communications, they were mostly
in the speakers' native tongues.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019201_MSG2003
rows.name:
I can tell they were speaking Japanese
and French, but I have no idea what
they were actually saying.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019201_MSG2004
rows.name:
...Hey, wait a minute. I just
realized that all those xenoforms
have been speaking English![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019201_MSG2005
rows.name:
Has English become the lingua
franca of space already? Good
gracious, that was fast![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019201_MSG2010
rows.name:
If we're returning to our old bodies,
I want to come back as the sparkly-eyed,
pink-cheeked teenager I once was![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019201_MSG2011
rows.name:
...At least, that's what I told Rutantan. But he
said that the Ma-non haven't been able to create
any sort of fountain-of-youth potions either.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev019201_MSG2012
rows.name:
So in THAT case, I want to
stay young and beautiful
forever inside this Blue Blood.[ST:wait ]
